description: Create a polygon named 'Bora Bora Main Island' tracing the coastline of the main island of Bora Bora (16.5004°S, 151.7415°W), excluding reef and motu islets. Calculate the Polsby-Popper compactness score (4*pi*Area/Perimeter²) using the measured area in square kilometers and perimeter in kilometers. Save the location, area, perimeter, and score to /home/ga/bora_bora_shape_analysis.txt.

metadata.data_source: Google Earth satellite imagery - real geographic data
